3312870.name: Ascending Inferno Soundtrack
3312870.description:
This is the Deluxe Version of the Ascending Inferno original soundtrack, composed by Dan Poole and featuring Amelia Jones. This album features the main theme, and the tracks for each level throughout the game (including the tutorial). As well as all cinematic music (both with and without SFX). 

All proceeds go directly to Dan Poole, our talented composer who is responsible for the OST of Ascending Inferno.

The songs in this OST can be used in any videos or live broadcasts as long as those videos or live broadcasts are not being used to advertise in any way. Further, directly reuploading the songs in this OST with no other content is prohibited.

The intention is that you can use the songs as background music on your Twitch Streams or YouTube Streams/Videos without worry of DMCA. Not to include the songs in advertising stuff or put them in your games or trailers.

This OST contains both MP3 and High Quality WAV files.
